textByHashes.989554aa9bb6888a4f53778f80d5c0c59934fd47: You offered yourself to Zulrah as a sacrifice, yet here you stand before me. Did Zulrah reject you?
textByHashes.e3b8383661d511f2df50c47295ad86ce90a7099a: Perhaps you should try offering yourself again, before the mighty Zulrah grows impatient.
textByHashes.90dd9ab4afeb472ab66c22f1121a8ae1573054f5: Very funny, human, but I find that hard to believe. Go and offer yourself as a sacrifice again, before the mighty Zulrah grows impatient.
textByHashes.a056da862aa7f4a760c10d057e39a03b1a35851f: I think you have misunderstood the nature of the sacrifice, human. Never mind, the mighty Zulrah will make the matter clear to you.
textByHashes.b047eb213fe0c9bbdcd7e27b470ce46c6131e82e: Zulrah is the all-powerful snake god of the southern wastes. He rises from the swamp to show his divine majesty and to accept our homage.
textByHashes.150edf9f9ebbd5df3c3272224ab8f7a4a5ea9727: Long ago, our forebears came to this place, not realising that they were trespassing in Zulrah's domain. He arose from the swamp in wrath, and many were slain.
textByHashes.1834306965c9fc3dba8a021c64bd545ec3cb64dc: But Zulrah, in his mercy, allowed some of those transgressors to live, sparing them the punishment they deserved, and allowing them the chance to repent.
textByHashes.15735f30325300b4eb049b626c3993e9e9546760: Then my mother, oldest and wisest of the tribe, dared to intercede with the mighty Zulrah on behalf of her people, and thus a sacred contract was declared.
textByHashes.86f1b73a9993f67dea753e6389d61276ba597a99: Zulrah granted us the right to dwell in his lands, and to eat of their bounty. None shall ever drive us out, for Zulrah protects us.
textByHashes.5dfb18ca045359513816a87c7b4e1eb18ddc43a7: All he asks in return is a periodic sacrifice at his sacred shrine. As long as the sacrifices continue, Zulrah will let us live peacefully in his lands.
textByHashes.f9e364278b18584c5959d5de7cdaaa9882b13dda: Willing volunteers are never hard to find, for their sacrifice buys peace for the tribe, and I grant their families extra rations of food.
textByHashes.d862e857fd8ebeed231c7f38e3ee462ea40a4b53: The southern wastes are a perilous place where travellers often become lost. Elves from the woodland villages, gnomes from the eastern caves, and many others.
textByHashes.64804a9418c19c0b60c332d8e165fe694997a72e: Some find their way here, like my forebears did. They eat of the sacred swamp eels that Zulrah sends, and become one with the tribe.
textByHashes.d3b80f3128ac9ad22cdecdf643295bcb17f70a9f: Their original families and tribes shun them as unclean creatures once they have tasted of the sacred swamp eels, so they remain here to worship Zulrah.
textByHashes.0ca502c8fe115ae407eacb86e3d53e12fb067c2e: Do you wish me to tell you more of Zulrah, human?
textByHashes.add2507043d1ae815f967991eda8e1f39c4eddf2: Why do you bother the High Priestess of Zulrah, human?
textByHashes.89c41306cb888809f38e21db4c2e5c0418c80396: Volunteers offer themselves gladly, knowing that their sacrifice is for the good of the tribe. Also, I grant their families extra rations of food.
textByHashes.2f1fd854d0d05364d479558290f0b07a82b1174e: The next sacrifice is a brave gnome who has just come of age. He waits by the boat now.
textByHashes.9739cac081f010a71932187479c7bee63d6b7ee9: You would offer yourself as a sacrifice in his place? Your dedication to Zulrah must be truly profound to make such an offer...
textByHashes.8ca51863318d3b4d7275f1fbea5ddbf8b6ea20fe: ... and I accept. You shall be our next sacrifice. Board the boat when you are ready, and give glory to Zulrah through your death.
textByHashes.aa467f96e8559c8c7c7a3c241d0fc384a305f5a2: I see you have not yet offered yourself as a sacrifice to Zulrah, human. Climb into the boat, and the priestess will deliver you to the shrine.
